thesis: Premarket faded from $87.10 (Friday RTH high) and is making lower highs. Place a buy stop above the most recent reactive high so the order only triggers if the downtrend flips into a higher-high. 3:1 R:R with stop below today's PM low.
exit_priority: If a single 1-min bar touches both stop and target after entry, assume STOP fills first (conservative).
If neither stop nor target hit by 16:00 ET, mark as open-at-close, exit at session close price.
